backend/main.mo: Motoko actor that stores and manages priority leads from both a form and a chatbot, exposing submitLead, submitChatLead, and getLeads functions with typed budget/timeline variants.
feature_evidence.json: Feature evidence report documenting that the Hero.tsx headline was updated to capitalize 'Custom Homes', with associated component dependencies and test ID REQ-18.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: JSON catalog of short summaries for every frontend source file, describing the navy/blue palette theme, component responsibilities, and key changes across the project.
frontend/index.css: Tailwind base CSS defining OKLCH color tokens for light and dark themes using neutral (zero chroma) values for most design tokens and a few colored chart/destructive variables.
frontend/index.html: HTML entry point with SEO meta tags, Local Business JSON-LD schema for Medina Valley Homes, and Google Fonts preconnect links.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Root TanStack Router setup with a HomePage route and an /admin route, with ChatBot mounted globally in the root layout so it appears on all pages.
frontend/src/components/BuildOptions.tsx: Section component displaying four build option cards (semi-custom, fully custom, lot+build packages, design consultation) with a CTA button that scrolls to the priority list form.
frontend/src/components/ChatBot.tsx: Floating AI Sales Assistant chatbot with a rule-based qualification flow covering intent, timeline, budget, and lead capture stages, submitting collected data to the backend via useSubmitChatLead.
frontend/src/components/Contact.tsx: Renders the Contact section with phone, email, and location info for Medina Valley Homes, plus a Phase 1 reservation notice and an embedded OpenStreetMap iframe.
frontend/src/components/FloorPlans.tsx: Displays a grid of four home floor plan cards with details (beds, baths, sqft, pricing) and opens a Dialog modal with full plan features and an inquiry CTA on click.
frontend/src/components/Footer.tsx: Site footer with brand logo, quick navigation links, contact details, and a copyright line with dynamic year.
frontend/src/components/Header.tsx: Fixed top navigation header with scroll-aware background, desktop nav links, a phone CTA, a 'Join Priority List' button, and a collapsible mobile menu.
frontend/src/components/Hero.tsx: Full-screen hero section with a background image, overlay gradient, headline, two CTA buttons linking to homesites and priority list, and a scroll-down indicator.
frontend/src/components/Location.tsx: Section highlighting the Medina Valley build location with four benefit cards, an aerial image, and an embedded OpenStreetMap iframe.
frontend/src/components/LotMap.tsx: Renders an interactive SVG lot map with 20 lots, each color-coded by status (available, reserved, model, phase2), and displays a popup with lot details and a request-info action on click.
frontend/src/components/PriorityListForm: A lead capture form for the priority list that collects name, contact info, budget, timeline, and lot preference, then submits via the useSubmitLead mutation and shows a success confirmation.
frontend/src/components/WhyChoose.tsx: A static marketing section listing builder benefits and a founder bio card with contact details for Medina Valley Homes.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: A React Query hook that creates and caches an ICP backend actor (anonymous or authenticated based on identity) and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Provides an Internet Identity authentication context with login/logout functionality, AuthClient management, and status tracking via a React context and hook.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Exports React Query hooks for fetching leads (useGetLeads) and submitting priority list or chat leads (useSubmitLead, useSubmitChatLead) via the ICP backend actor.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Google Fonts, configures Tailwind, and defines a navy/blue CSS custom property color palette for both light and dark themes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app wrapped in QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider.
frontend/src/pages/AdminPage.tsx: Admin dashboard page that fetches and displays lead submissions in a table with columns for name, contact info, budget, timeline, and timestamp. Includes loading/error states and a refresh button.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the Medina Valley Homes frontend, defining a navy/blue color palette, custom fonts (Playfair Display, Inter), CSS variable-based semantic colors, and plugins for typography, container queries, and animations.
project_state.json: Project state metadata file tracking the current version, architectural decisions, known issues, and a list of implemented features for the Medina Valley Homes custom home builder website built on the Internet Computer.
